PROP-baseauction-inv-068.text: Stale Data Streams price must fall back to Data Feed only when dataFeed is configured.
PROP-baseauction-inv-068.assertion: streamsStale AND usdDataFeed!=address(0) => use dataFeed; usdDataFeed==0 => keep stale streams

locations.note: line 385: condition checks updatedAt < minTimestamp AND usdDataFeed != address(0) before falling back
